text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp. A season that plays<n>an important
function, where racers<n>strengthen their body and
mind.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Summer's here... And what does<n>summer make
you think of? Events,<n>right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And the biggest event of them all is<n>comic co—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uhhh, I meant... the Japan Dirt<n>Derby, of
course...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This is no time to fall down in worship<n>in front of
the Umamusume<n>cosplayers like previous years.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Get on it, Digitan! This summer, we'll<n>be
discovering the very source of<n>Uma divinity! And
then...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: In my spare time, I can work on my<n>manuscripts!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's going to have a<n>productive
summer, both on and off<n>of the track.
